issue_summary: Factored Kth selector and pivoting strategy out from Percentile.
javadoc_before:
/** * Constructs a Percentile with the specific quantile value. *
    *
  • default method type: {@link EstimationType#LEGACY}
    • *
  • default NaN strategy: {@link NaNStrategy#FIXED}
    • *
  • default pivoting strategy: {@link PivotingStrategy#MEDIAN_OF_3}
    • *
* @param quantile the quantile * @throws MathIllegalArgumentException if p is not greater than 0 and less * than or equal to 100 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Constructs a Percentile with the specific quantile value and the following *
    *
  • default method type: {@link EstimationType#LEGACY}
    • *
  • default NaN strategy: {@link NaNStrategy#REMOVED}
    • *
  • a Kth Selector : {@link KthSelector}
    • *
* @param quantile the quantile * @throws MathIllegalArgumentException if p is not greater than 0 and less * than or equal to 100 */
